title: Create Space Adventure
description: This pack is an amazing adventure! Technology, adventure, and most importantly, Fun!
body:
![Create Space Adventure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0eaee8c0db990eda587f9f1df2974675cdb89da0.png)

For the future of this modpack I will be losing the focus in space and will be creating a new modpack entirely based on this on called Create Explore the World!
### Content Added:
- **Computers**
- **Furniture**
- **Skills**
- **Archeology**
- **Storage Solutions**
- **Space**
- **Shaders**
- **Improved Combat System**
- **Energy**
- **Minimap**
- **Worldmap**
### Content Planned:
- **Quests**
